title: Escape From the Chateau
description: On pages 4–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Luffy, Big Mom Pirates as The tea party collapses into chaos as the alliance tries to flee Big Mom’s territory.
scene: The assassination plan fails and the wedding becomes a desperate escape from a collapsing battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fishman Island, during the time that Luffy and the others were staying there

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: about giving all of the treasure to Luffy and the others, well...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I would like to ask you to consider asking them to return only the TAMATebako.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've already given it to them! I will never go back on my word!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the?! if we open it, it'll explode?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is there a chance it's a dud and won't explode, minister of the right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From the ceiling of the second floor of the East Baun,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are some cracks making their way across the anbaum meeting room!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's going on?! The whole room's started tilting!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Heard an explosion, loud and clear!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As if enemies would be able to infiltrated all the way to our shores!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What in the world just exploded?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Does all this have anything to do

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: With the wedding on the roof?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That thing... so that's what it was?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Has to be. What else could have exploded?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whatever it was, it was just in the nick of time!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We were about to be dead meat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What the hell is going on?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Whether or not we were actually saved

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Due to some sort of explosion, whole cake chateau is currently collapsing!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 50 dialogue beats. The alliance survives the failed tea party by turning the chaos into a retreat.
